tasks.label: build-cli
tasks.detail: Build the solution (Debug|x64) with the VS 18 Insiders MSBuild — required v145 toolset (see CLAUDE.md). NOT `dotnet build`: this is a C++ project.

tasks.label: npm-install-extension
tasks.detail: Install the VS Code extension's dependencies (vscode-languageclient) so the LSP client can load.

tasks.label: prepare-extension
tasks.detail: Build the CLI (which hosts `polyglot lsp`) and install the extension deps before launching.
